headline: A Look At STERIS (STE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business scale STERIS (STE) has drawn investor attention after a period in which the stock declined about 6% over the past month and roughly 14% over the past 3 months, prompting closer review of its fundamentals. The company reports annual revenue of US$5.94b and net income of US$782.3m, with operations spanning Healthcare, Applied Sterilization Technologies and Life Sciences, and a market value of about US$20.68b.
